title: Trump's crypto riches loom over Clarity Act talks to ban conflicts for U.S. officials
summary: Discussion among Democrats have fixed on the president's personal gains when hashing out the crypto market structure bill's ethics provision.

title: Mizuho says Circle bank approval doesn't solve USDC growth, stablecoin competition risks
summary: Japanese investment bank Mizuho reiterated its neutral rating on Circle, saying OCC approval for a national trust bank doesn't address slowing USDC growth or rising competition.

title: Bitcoin panic-selling may be ending as sellers' profit margins disappear
summary: Analysts point to bitcoin’s resilience amid fresh U.S.-Iran escalation and renewed spot ETF inflows as the clearest signs yet that the marginal seller has stepped away.

title: Strategy pauses its Bitcoin buying spree to hoard a massive $3 billion cash cushion
summary: Strategy now has more than 20 months of coverage for preferred-stock dividends and debt interest.

title: Robinhood built a blockchain for tokenized stocks. Memecoins took over
summary: Robinhood Chain has pulled in $135 million of value and 800,000 addresses since July 1. Almost none of it is doing what the chain was built for.
